title: Dendrolirium laniceps
taxonomy: Dendrolirium laniceps is a genus of orchids, and as such, its classification is as follows: it belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants. Within this family, Dendrolirium laniceps is placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae. The subfamily Orchidoideae is further divided into several tribes, with Dendrolirium laniceps being a member of the tribe Dendrobieae. The tribe Dendrobieae is a group of terrestrial orchids that are native to tropical Asia and the Pacific. This classification is based on morphological and molecular characteristics of the plant.
uses: Dendrolirium laniceps is a species of orchid, and while information on it is limited, it has been reported to have potential medicinal uses in traditional medicine.
